title: Bootstrap Customization Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of SASS variable overrides, CSS variables, and the Utility API for custom class generation.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily recommended way to customize Bootstrap's default styles?
options: By writing all your own CSS from scratch.
By using SASS (SCSS) and overriding Bootstrap's internal variables before compilation.
By editing the bootstrap.min.css file directly.

questions.question: Which version of Bootstrap introduced a comprehensive set of native CSS Variables (also known as CSS custom properties)?
Where should you override a Bootstrap SASS variable to ensure it takes character?
Which and/or what is Bootstrap's 'Utility API' used for?
options: To easily generate, modify, or remove utility classes in SASS.
To speed up browser network requests.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.

questions.question: Does Bootstrap customization allow you to create a completely unique design system on top of its framework foundation?
options: Yes, by overriding colors, fonts, spacing, components, and even utility classes.
No, you can only change the colors.
